🔧 Core Features:

GitHub: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/tree/main/skills/ai-content-pipeline

⚙️ Technical Stack:

• Framework: OpenClaw
• Language: Python/TypeScript
• Integration: REST API + Webhooks
• Deployment: Docker ready
• Monitoring: Built-in

Zero infrastructure headaches.

🚀 Quick Start (3 steps):

```bash
# 1. Install
openclaw skills install ai-content-pipeline

# 2. Configure  
cp config.example.yaml config.yaml

# 3. Run
openclaw run ai-content-pipeline
```

That's it. 5 minutes to automation.
